meta.description: Video-optimized prompts for AnimateDiff. Use with Crestline_AnimateDiff_Txt2Vid_v1.json. For img2vid, use Crestline_AnimateDiff_Img2Vid_v1.json instead — the prompts there act as gentle guidance, not primary drivers.
meta.note: Video prompts include motion-friendly language. Avoid hard edges, fine text, or rapidly changing elements — AnimateDiff handles smooth, continuous motion best.

exterior.label: Golden Hour Slow Reveal
exterior.positive: CrestlineExt, high-end modern residential skyscraper, glass balconies, sleek facade, golden hour lighting, warm sunlight, smooth slow motion, cinematic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8k
exterior.negative: blurry, distorted, cartoon, people, watermark, flickering, jitter, fast cuts, noise, oversaturated, deformed
